headline: CONFIRMATION. Live composite 10.9 (Critical band). April 23 layoff announcement (8,000 workers + 6,000 cancelled open roles) joins existing record of child-safety AI scandal, FTC investigation, $8B shareholder lawsuit, March 2026 NM jury ($375M potential), April 2026 LA jury ($6M with Google). Meta Platforms (Fortune 500 entity) tracks the parent corporate scoring; live composite 10.9 already deeply reflects accumulated evidence. Sub-5pt EMP calibration available but composite is already in lower-Critical positioning consistent with the evidence stack. Confirm.

evidence.finding: 8,000 layoffs (10% workforce); 6,000 cancelled open roles; AI capex $115-135B 2026 vs $72B 2025.
NM jury verdict (CSAM exploitation): $375M penalty potential. LA jury (addiction): $6M with Google. Establishes liability for known harms.
